creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 254565
Patch for fusefs-gphotofs

Last commit in 2018 and last release in 2015, update to latest commit as there are a few bug fixes / enhancements as active development seems to have stopped.

While at it update WWW entry

Reference:
https://github.com/gphoto/gphotofs/commits/master/

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)
